title: Sweet and Smoky Fritter Bites
description: A twist on traditional fritters, these bite-sized treats combine the sweetness of Filipino influences with a smoky kick.

ingredients.name: Fritter mix
ingredients.notes: Typically found in Asian or Filipino markets

instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, mix together flour, Gruyere cheese, mashed sweet plantains, smoked paprika, fritter mix, and egg.
Add water as needed to achieve a thick batter consistency.
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop small balls of batter into the hot oil.
Fry fritter bites until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain on paper towels and serve warm.
